name: Russian Tea Cakes/Mexican Wedding Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add 2 tablespoons of powdered sugar, egg yolk, vanilla, and almonds to the butter. Mix well.
3. Gradually incorporate the remaining flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Pinch off pieces of dough the size of large walnuts.
5. Roll each piece into a ball between your palms.
6. Place the balls 1 1/2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets; flatten slightly.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 275°F for about 45 minutes, or until very lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheets until lukewarm.
9. Sift half of the remaining powdered sugar onto wax paper.
10. Roll each cookie gently in the sifted sugar.
11. Using your fingers, sprinkle more sugar over the cookies to a depth of about 1/8 inch.
12. Place cookies on wire racks and dust generously with additional powdered sugar.
13. Store in airtight containers, layered between sheets of wax paper. Makes 3 dozen.
